properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's no silver or gold And no treasure untold That could draw me away from Your heart Neither love of myself Or of anyone else will do

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus nothing compares To this grace that rescues me Savior now and forever Your face is all I seek

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now all I am, I lay at Your feet I'm humbled by the wonder of Your majesty One thing I know, I find all I need In Your unending love In Your unending love

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Letting go of my pride I lay down my desires Just to worship in Spirit and truth More than all of my dreams More than fame I will seek You, Lord

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Jesus nothing compares To this grace that rescued me Savior, now and forever Your face is all I seek
